headerSubtitle: Clash Royale reliability checker · Made by displaynone for the Resistance family clans
selectClanHint: Select a clan (restricted to Resistance family clans)
searchHint: Tags must start with #. You can omit it and we'll add it automatically.
searchPanelTitle: 🔍 Who do you want to analyze?
battleLogDataDescription: New arrival in the family. The Battle Log API returns only the last 30 battles, across all modes.
battleLogDataTableDesc: Weekly River Race count inferred from latest data.
battleLogNoFurtherData: No further clan history available (Battle Log only).
warJoinedDuringWeekNote: Joined during the war week — can't count battles this week
sourceHint: ℹ️ Live data is used for today, snapshots for past days
warSnapshotDataInvalid: Some historical day snapshot data is missing or inconsistent; totals may not be fully reliable.
everyoneInClanCompleted16: Everyone still in clan completed 16 decks 👍
lastWarBestDesc: List of clan players who performed best during the last GDC week (minimum 2600 pts)
lastWarFailsDesc: List of clan players who did not complete all 16 decks during the last GDC week
leftClanDesc: List of players who have left the clan (historical)
clickToLoadTopPlayers: Open the section to load data on demand.
clickToLoadUncomplete: Open the section to load data on demand.
clickToLoadMembers: Open the section to load the members table.
clickToLoadLeftClan: Open the section to load left members on demand.
leftClanNoData: No players have left the clan yet.
errorLoadingSection: Failed to load this section. Try again.
scoreExplainerFull: Score out of 48 pts (full mode with battle log), 45 pts (full mode without), or 40 pts (fallback, battle log only). Up to 5 additional pts for last seen activity → 53 pts maximum (45 pts for fallback).
regularityCap: war decks used / (16×weeks), –0.5 pt per incomplete week
thresholds: ■ ≥ 76 % High reliability   ■ 56–75 % Low risk   ■ 31–55 % High risk   ■ ≤ 30 % Extreme risk
fallbackFormulaTitle: If no river-race history is available, a fallback formula is used
fallbackFormulaBody: War Activity (max 8), General Activity (8), CW2 badge (10), Last Seen (3, requires ~16 war decks), Experience (3), Donations (2) and Discord (2).
rateLimitedWarning: Clash API rate limit exceeded — partial data may be displayed, retry in a few seconds.
clanStabilityDetail: {{s}} consecutive weeks in this clan or family
discordDetail: Discord account linked to the server
fallbackBadge: Estimate based on API battle log (≤ 30 entries) — no war history available
riverRaceHistoryNote: ℹ️ Data from {{count}} completed river races. Indigo = above average, red = below average. Dashed line = average ({{avgFame}} pts).
riverRaceHistoryIgnored: Grey bar indicates a week ignored for scoring (likely joined mid-race).
noRiverRaceHistoryNote1: No River Race history found for this player (recent member).
noRiverRaceHistoryWhySummary: Why might this score be less accurate?
noRiverRaceHistoryWhyDetail: The API battle log covers at most 30 entries (war or non-war). For a long-standing member this is reliable, but for a recent recruit who just joined a clan, their previous clan's war history is lost — only these last 30 battles carry over. The reliability estimate may therefore be less precise than for an established member.
raceTimeDesc: River race GDC decks per hour (local Europe/Paris).
raceTimeNoHistory: 2 weeks of River Race history required for this view.
raceTimeNoGdc: No GDC battles found in the BattleLog.
clanLiteNotice: This clan is not in the family. War reliability score is not available.
clickToLoadRaceGroup: Open this section to compare group clans (may take a few seconds).
warGroupDescription: Compare the 5 clans of the current River Race group
